title: Carter Realty — Listing Playbook (excerpt)
text:
Carter Realty Listing Playbook.

For every new buyer inquiry on 2410 Magnolia Ridge, anchor the reply to the seller's preferred terms:

— Offer window closes Friday at 5pm. Mention the deadline explicitly.
— Seller will entertain rent-back of up to 30 days, post-close.
— Inspection contingency is welcome; financing contingency must be removed within 14 days of binding.
— Reference Bonnie as the listing coordinator and copy her on every reply.

Default closing signature for buyer inquiries is 'Thanks for the interest, — Carter' (no honorific, no firm name on the signoff).
